channel.title: theStacc Changelog
channel.description: New features, fixes, and improvements shipped by theStacc.

item.title: v3.4.0: AI Humanizer v3 — every article passes Originality.ai with a 99% score.
item.description: We retrained the humanizer model on 30,000 articles flagged by every major AI detector. The new model rewrites your draft so no detector can flag it. Auto-runs on every article.
item.content:encoded:
We retrained the humanizer model on 30,000 articles flagged by every major AI detector. The new model rewrites your draft so no detector can flag it. Auto-runs on every article.

  • Average detector score: 99% human (up from 91%)
  • No extra step in your workflow — runs on every draft
  • Bypasses Originality.ai, GPTZero, Copyleaks, Turnitin, ZeroGPT
  • Adds 8 to 12 seconds to the publishing pipeline
  • Free for every customer on every plan

item.title: v3.3.0: Shopify connector — auto-publish to your storefront blog in one click.
item.description: You can now connect a Shopify store and ship every article straight to your blog. No code. No webhook. Approval flow optional.
item.content:encoded:
You can now connect a Shopify store and ship every article straight to your blog. No code. No webhook. Approval flow optional.

  • OAuth connection — no API keys to copy and paste
  • Auto-tags, auto-categories, auto-author byline
  • Publishes with featured image, SEO meta, and product cross-links
  • Works with Shopify Plus and standard plans
  • Optional approval queue before publish

item.title: v3.2.0: Map Pack heat-map — see your rank in every grid square around your business.
item.description: A 9×9 grid around your location shows your Google Maps rank for every keyword you track. Spot weak zones. Fix them with targeted GBP posts.
item.content:encoded:
A 9×9 grid around your location shows your Google Maps rank for every keyword you track. Spot weak zones. Fix them with targeted GBP posts.

  • Default radius: 5 miles (configurable up to 25)
  • Tracks 81 grid points per keyword
  • Refreshes daily, history retained for 12 months
  • Available on Local SEO and Bundle plans
  • CSV export and PNG snapshot for client reports

item.title: v3.1.2: Brand voice training: 30 samples now enough (was 50).
item.description: We improved the voice model so customers can start ranking with half the training data. Same accuracy.
item.content:encoded:
We improved the voice model so customers can start ranking with half the training data. Same accuracy.

  • Required samples dropped from 50 to 30
  • Brand voice match score: 94% (vs 91% in v3.0)
  • Faster onboarding — first article live in 24 hours
  • Existing customers automatically benefit on next regeneration

item.title: v3.1.1: Webflow CMS push — fixed broken alt text on image fields.
item.description: Some Webflow collections were receiving empty alt text on hero images. Fixed at the API layer — no action needed on your end.
item.content:encoded:
Some Webflow collections were receiving empty alt text on hero images. Fixed at the API layer — no action needed on your end.

  • Affected Webflow customers between May 22 and May 29
  • Auto-backfill ran on every affected article
  • No SEO impact (alt text rewritten before Google recrawl)
  • Apology email sent to 23 affected customers

item.title: v3.1.0: Auto review responses — now in 12 languages.
item.description: Reply to every Google review in the language the reviewer wrote in. English, Spanish, Hindi, French, German, Portuguese, Tagalog, Vietnamese, Mandarin, Arabic, Italian, Japanese.
item.content:encoded:
Reply to every Google review in the language the reviewer wrote in. English, Spanish, Hindi, French, German, Portuguese, Tagalog, Vietnamese, Mandarin, Arabic, Italian, Japanese.

  • 12 languages auto-detected per review
  • Tone matches your brand voice in every language
  • Reply time still under 5 minutes
  • Free for every Local SEO customer

item.title: v3.0.4: OAuth scope tightening — Google connection now read-only by default.
item.description: We narrowed the scopes we request from Google. Read-only is now the default for GBP. Posting access is requested only when you turn auto-publish on.
item.content:encoded:
We narrowed the scopes we request from Google. Read-only is now the default for GBP. Posting access is requested only when you turn auto-publish on.

  • Default scopes: read-only
  • Write scopes requested only on auto-publish opt-in
  • Existing customers re-prompted on next sign-in
  • Audit trail of every scope change in the dashboard

item.title: v3.0.3: Faster dashboard — 2.3× speed-up on the article list page.
item.description: We moved the article-list query to a materialised view. Customers with 500+ articles see the biggest jump.
item.content:encoded:
We moved the article-list query to a materialised view. Customers with 500+ articles see the biggest jump.

  • Median load time: 480ms (down from 1,100ms)
  • P95 load time: 920ms (down from 2,800ms)
  • Pagination switched from offset to cursor
  • No UI changes — just faster

item.title: v3.0.2: Stripe webhook retry — duplicate charges prevented.
item.description: A rare race condition could cause a duplicate charge on plan upgrades. Patched. Refunds issued automatically.
item.content:encoded:
A rare race condition could cause a duplicate charge on plan upgrades. Patched. Refunds issued automatically.

  • Affected 4 customers between April 28 and May 2
  • All duplicate charges refunded within 24 hours
  • Webhook handler now idempotent by event_id
  • Postmortem published in our public engineering blog

item.title: v3.0.1: Better dashboard onboarding — 4 steps cut to 2.
item.description: New customers reach their first published article in under 12 minutes. Average dropped from 24 to 11 minutes.
item.content:encoded:
New customers reach their first published article in under 12 minutes. Average dropped from 24 to 11 minutes.

  • Connect site → connect Google → done
  • Brand voice training moved to background job
  • No more "wait for setup to finish" screen
  • Conversion to first publish: 78% (up from 61%)

item.title: v3.0.0: Bundle plan — Content + Local + Social for $167/mo.
item.description: One subscription. Three modules. Saves $30/mo versus à la carte. Comes with priority support and a unified weekly report.
item.content:encoded:
One subscription. Three modules. Saves $30/mo versus à la carte. Comes with priority support and a unified weekly report.

  • All 3 modules under one login
  • Unified Friday revenue-attribution email
  • Priority Slack channel for Bundle customers
  • $30/mo discount vs. à la carte ($197)
  • Free upgrade from existing plans — no contract reset

item.title: v2.9.4: Citation builder — submit to 50 directories in one click.
item.description: NAP-consistent submissions to Yelp, Bing Places, Apple Maps, Yellow Pages, Foursquare and 45 more. Monitor changes daily.
item.content:encoded:
NAP-consistent submissions to Yelp, Bing Places, Apple Maps, Yellow Pages, Foursquare and 45 more. Monitor changes daily.

  • 50 directories supported at launch
  • NAP consistency monitored daily
  • Auto-correct on profile drift
  • Free for every Local SEO customer
